mapper.sql: id, name, email, status, created_at, updated_at
mapper.select: SELECT id, name, email, status, created_at, updated_at FROM ( SELECT id, name, email, status, created_at, updated_at FROM users ) u ORDER BY created_at DESC
select count(1) from () tmp
SELECT FROM users ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 100
mapper.update:
UPDATE users
name = #{name},
email = #{email},
status = #{status},
updated_at = #{updatedAt},
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS total FROM users GROUP BY status ORDER BY status
SELECT DISTINCT status FROM users ORDER BY status

WITH recent_users AS ( SELECT id, name, email, status, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE created_at >= #{createdAfter} ) SELECT id, name, email, status, created_at, updated_at FROM recent_users ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT DISTINCT status FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT status FROM users ) ds ORDER BY status
SELECT id, name, email, status, created_at, updated_at FROM ( SELECT FROM users ) u ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, name, email, status, created_at, updated_at FROM ( SELECT FROM users ) recent_users ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 100
SELECT DISTINCT u.status FROM users u ORDER BY u.status
SELECT id, name, email FROM users ORDER BY NULL
SELECT id, name, email, status, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, name, email, status, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE status IN ('ACTIVE') ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, name, email, status, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' OR status = 'PENDING' ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, CASE WHEN TRUE THEN status ELSE status END AS status FROM users ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, COALESCE(status, status) AS status FROM users ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, name, email, status, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE id = 1 + 1 ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id, name, email, status, created_at, updated_at FROM users ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1000000
SELECT id, name, email, status, created_at, updated_at FROM users WHERE email = NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT DISTINCT ON (status) status FROM users ORDER BY status
SELECT id, name, email, status, created_at, updated_at FROM users u WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM users u2 WHERE u2.id = u.id) ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT id AS id, name AS name, email AS email, status AS status, created_at AS created_at, updated_at AS updated_at FROM users ORDER BY created_at DESC
SELECT u.id AS id, u.name AS name, u.email AS email, u.status AS status, u.created_at AS created_at, u.updated_at AS updated_at FROM users u ORDER BY u.created_at DESC

SELECT id AS id, name AS name, email AS email, status AS status, created_at AS created_at, updated_at AS updated_at FROM users
status = #{status}
status != 'DELETED'
ORDER BY created_at DESC
